name: lazysync
description: Desktop app for syncing and publishing content.
author: LazySync

scripts.build:electron:main: tsup electron/main/index.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node20 --out-dir .electron-build/main --external electron --clean
scripts.build:electron:preload: tsup electron/preload/index.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node20 --out-dir .electron-build/preload --external electron
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:electron:main && npm run build:electron:preload
scripts.dev:desktop: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run build:electron && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build:src:electron:main: tsup main/index.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node20 --out-dir .src-electron-build/main --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external playwright --clean
scripts.build:src:electron:preload: tsup preload/index.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node20 --out-dir .src-electron-build/preload --external electron --external better-sqlite3
scripts.build:src:electron: npm run build:src:electron:main && npm run build:src:electron:preload
scripts.dev:src:desktop: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5180 && npm run build:src:electron && cross-env SRC_VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5180 electron ./.src-electron-build/main/index.js
scripts.build: npm run build:src:web && npm run build:src:electron
scripts.dist:desktop:dmg: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg
